rationale: The "satisfaction payoff" emotional beat is on-brand for Marble Sort's calm/satisfying mood and the casual female 25-55 audience overlaps well with word/crossword players, but the actual hook is fundamentally mismatched: it shows word-spelling and letter-tapping mechanics, not color sorting, timing, or physics drops, which will mislead installs and tank D1 retention. The warm brown/yellow/green donut palette also clashes with Marble Sort's soft lavender/orange identity. Recommend rebuilding the archetype around the same satisfaction arc but using a marble drop into matching boxes with a crisp clear-animation payoff — keep the structure, swap the content.
